name: io.github.ThoTischner/observability-mcp
description: Unified observability gateway for AI agents — one MCP server for Prometheus, Loki, and any backend with cross-signal anomaly detection

environmentVariables.name: PORT
environmentVariables.description: HTTP port for the MCP endpoint and Web UI (default: 3000)

environmentVariables.name: PROMETHEUS_URL
environmentVariables.description: Prometheus URL(s), comma-separated for multiple (e.g. http://prom1:9090,http://prom2:9090)

environmentVariables.name: LOKI_URL
environmentVariables.description: Loki URL(s), comma-separated for multiple (e.g. http://loki1:3100,http://loki2:3100)
